race.comment: HEZANGELIC (2) led and won over the 1000m journey at Ascot last start and will find this a much easier assignment today. O'Donnell's claim comes in handy and she knows the gelding well. Should take up the running from a good draw and he'll take plenty of catching. FAVAIOS (5) led and won over 1200m last start, scoring by 0.4L when on the quick turnaround. Down in weight here and she can track HEZANGELIC across to be on the speed. Can play a leading role. GOD HAS DRIFTED (1) was too good over 1230m last time out and drops back to 1100m today. Building nicely this time in work and he's sure to put his best foot forward. TOP OF THE POPS (8) bounced back to form last start after stepping up to the mile two back. Can be flying home late in the race. INSYDE SUCCESS (6) gets the tongue tie off today for Campbell and has a good record at this track and trip. Include.
